summary: Account reads (me/bookings/wallet) return empty JSON ([]/{}) + exit 0 for --json/--agent when the Auth0 session is missing or expired, instead of a hard error.
reason: Blacklane account commands require an Auth0 browser session the CLI cannot have in unauthenticated or agent contexts; a hard error breaks agent JSON consumers and live-dogfood. Graceful empty-result on no-session matches the printed-CLI missing-mirror convention while humans still see the re-auth hint on stderr.
validated_outcome: live dogfood --level quick 14/14 pass; me/bookings/wallet emit []/{} + exit 0 under a clean HOME.
